title: 无标题文章
summary: Short video from Usagi Electric on a classic teletype that sends encoded data serially over RS232 which is the foundation for today's /dev/tty that drives modern terminal emulation. https://www. youtube.com/watch?v=31JBOlrzPXs
content:
Short video from Usagi Electric on a classic teletype that sends encoded data serially over RS232 which is the foundation for today's /dev/tty that drives modern terminal emulation.
